name: Longest Repeating Character Replacement
category: Sliding Window & Two Pointer Combined Problems
statement: Given an integer k and a string s, any character in the string can be selected and changed to any other uppercase English character. This operation can be performed up to k times. After completing these steps, return the length of the longest substring that contains the same letter.
constraints:
• 1 <= s.length <= 105
  • 0 <= k <= s.length
  • s contains only English uppercase letters.

examples.explanation: we can change the B present at index 0 , 3 (0 base indexing) to A. The new string is "AAAAAABBBAAA". The substring "AAAAAA" is the longest substring having same letter with length 6.
The underlined characters are changed in the new string obtained. The new string is "AABBBBA". The substring "BBBB" is the answer. There are other ways to achieve this answer.
